name: Sunday
description:
♥｜Falling back into yandere habits, even if he's trying really hard not to.

♘How can you improve your jllm experience?♘:

♘｜Frequently changing the temp to suit your need. Mine is at 1.1 but sometimes lowering it 0.9 may be good for complicated plots.

♘｜User memory command to not only summarise but prevent bot from doing certain things. E.g. {{char}} will never say 'heart, mind and soul'. I've used this in most of my bots and for me it has worked well.

♘｜USE CAPITAL TO CREATE EMPHASIS SO THE AI UNDERSTAND IT BETTER. WHETHER IN memory or response.

ooc: lmao i got wayy too lazy with description. sorry but exams are still on going. But the grind cant stop ig.

but lowkey. Recently i feel like having ppl pay genuine attention to my work is both good and bad. Good in the way that im exploring ideas i wouldnt have before. bad in the way i feel like i gotta publish smth when it's me forcing myself.

also idk if it's me. but ive played hi3rd as a rare fem player since like 2015 and every other hoyo game. and like idk i just realised how much the theme repeats with similiar characters. and that realisation recently made me lose a lot of passion.

but anyways. aint gonna start with all dat. but my upload schedule(if i even had one lmao) will probably be a lot less stable since im recently writing for ao3 that im enjoying a lot(nope i aint sharing) as well as oc bots from another acc as well as real life stuff.

hope yall are having a great day :)
